sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.36 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: Let$p$be a prime,$V$an$n$-dimen\-sional vector space over the field of$p$~elements, and let$G$be a subgroup of$GL(V)$. Let$S=S[V ^{ } ]$be the symmetric algebra on$V ^{ }$, the dual of$V$. Let$T=S^G$be the ring of invariants and let$b_m$be the dimension of the homogeneous component of degree$m$. Then the Poincar\'e series$_{m 0}b_mt^m$is a rational function with a Laurent power series expansion$_{...
